last_assistant_message:
I'm unable to verify the audit findings against live Azure DevOps data because the connection is returning an **authorization error**:

> `TF400813: The user is not authorized to access this resource.`

This means the Personal Access Token (PAT) configured for the Azure DevOps MCP server has either **expired** or **lost permissions**.

## Current Status of Audited Items

Based on the `TODO.md` file, all 3 tracked action items still show as **unresolved** (unchecked):

| # | Audit Finding | TODO Status | Verified Live? |
|---|--------------|:-----------:|:--------------:|
| 3.1 | Configure Team Capacity for Iteration 6.4 | `[ ]` Open | No — PAT expired |
| 3.2 | Add Description & Acceptance Criteria (14 stories) | `[ ]` Open | No — PAT expired |
| 3.4/3.5 | Clean up duplicate User Stories #199352/#199353 | `[ ]` Open | No — PAT expired |
| 3.3 | Redistribute workload from single assignee | Not tracked | No — PAT expired |
| 3.6 | Fix PI5/PI6 date overlap | Not tracked | No — PAT expired |
| 3.7 | Move stories from "New" to "Active" | Not tracked | No — PAT expired |
| 3.8 | Review aged carryover item #178753 | Not tracked | No — PAT expired |
| 3.9 | Create child Tasks under User Stories | Not tracked | No — PAT expired |
| 3.10 | Configure Project Wiki | Not tracked | No — PAT expired |

## Next Steps

To verify resolution, I need a valid Azure DevOps connection. Please:

1. **Regenerate or update your PAT** in Azure DevOps (Organization Settings > Personal Access Tokens)
2. **Update the MCP server configuration** with the new token
3. Once reconnected, I can query each work item and iteration to confirm which findings have been addressed

Would you like help with updating the PAT configuration?

ADO connectivity is working. Successfully connected to the **jairo** Azure DevOps organization and retrieved **28 projects**. 

The **OTP** project is present:
- **Name:** OTP
- **Description:** Office of the President initiatives and projects
- **Last Updated:** 2024-07-11

Connection is healthy and ready for auditing. What would you like to do next?

Here's my analysis of the project:

---

## OTP Project — Overview

**What it is:** This is a **SAFe (Scaled Agile Framework) audit workspace** for a project called **OTP (Office of the President)**, managed in **Azure DevOps** under the organization `jairo`.

### Project Purpose

The workspace serves as the tooling layer for an Agile PM consultant to **audit and mentor** the OTP team's adherence to SAFe practices. It connects to Azure DevOps via MCP tools to pull real project data and produce structured audit reports.

### Key Components

| Component | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `CLAUDE.md` | Defines the consultant role, goal (audit), and rules (report naming, SAFe compliance, diagrams, PDF generation) |
| `TODO.md` | Action items assigned to **Grace** for Iteration 6.4 — fixing duplicates, adding descriptions/acceptance criteria, configuring capacity |
| `audit/` | Contains the completed audit report (Markdown + PDF) from Feb 24, 2026 |
| `logs/` | Claude Code hook logs (chat, tool use, status line events) |
| `.claude/` | Local settings granting permission to the Azure DevOps MCP integration |

### Existing Audit (Iteration 6.4)

A comprehensive audit has already been completed, identifying **10 findings** across 4 severity levels:

- **3 Critical** — No team capacity configured, 82% of stories missing descriptions/acceptance criteria, entire workload on one person (Grace)
- **3 Structural** — Hierarchy inversion (User Story parenting a Feature), duplicate user stories, PI5/PI6 date overlap (40 days)
- **3 Process** — All stories still in "New" state, aged carryover item, no child tasks
- **1 Governance** — No project wiki configured

### Team & Iteration Context

- **Team:** OTP Team (currently only **Grace** as the sole assignee)
- **Current Iteration:** 6.4 (Feb 23 – Mar 8, 2026), part of PI6
- **Workload:** 18 work items (1 Feature, 17 User Stories), 45 story points
- **Categories:** Contracts & agreements, visa applications, HR/people development, compliance/legal, policy/business development

### Integration

The project uses the **Azure DevOps MCP server** to pull live data (work items, iterations, capacity, wiki status, etc.) directly from Azure DevOps for auditing purposes.

---

In short: this is an **audit ops workspace** — it connects to a real Azure DevOps project, evaluates it against SAFe standards, and produces structured audit reports with Mermaid diagrams and actionable recommendations. The first audit is done; the TODO items capture the remediation actions for Grace to execute.

I now have all the data needed. Let me compile the findings. Here's the resolution status of all 10 audit findings:

---

## Audit Follow-Up: Resolution Status Check

**Reference:** `AUDIT_20260224_221243.md` (Iteration 6.4)
**Check Date:** February 24, 2026

| # | Finding | Severity | Status | Detail |
|---|---------|----------|--------|--------|
| 3.1 | No Team Capacity Configured | Critical | **NOT RESOLVED** | Capacity is still empty for Iteration 6.4 |
| 3.2 | 82% of Stories Missing Desc & AC | Critical | **NOT RESOLVED** | All 14 stories still have no Description or Acceptance Criteria |
| 3.3 | Entire Workload on Single Assignee | Critical | **NOT RESOLVED** | All 18 items still assigned solely to Grace |
| 3.4 | Hierarchy Inversion (US #199352 → Feature #197326) | Structural | **NOT RESOLVED** | User Story #199352 still parents Feature #197326 |
| 3.5 | Duplicate User Stories (#199352 / #199353) | Structural | **NOT RESOLVED** | Both still exist in "New" state with identical titles |
| 3.6 | PI5 / PI6 Date Overlap (40 days) | Structural | **NOT RESOLVED** | PI5 ends Feb 20, PI6 starts Jan 12 — still overlapping |
| 3.7 | All User Stories in "New" State | Process | **PARTIALLY RESOLVED** | 5 stories moved to Active (#198867, #199355, #199525, #199579, #199580). 12 remain in "New" |
| 3.8 | Aged Carryover Item (#178753) | Process | **NOT RESOLVED** | Now at rev 11 (up from 10), but still in "New" state |
| 3.9 | No Child Tasks Under User Stories | Process | **NOT RESOLVED** | No Tasks found under any User Story in the iteration |
| 3.10 | No Project Wiki | Governance | **NOT RESOLVED** | Wiki list is still empty |

### Summary

- **Resolved:** 0 of 10
- **Partially Resolved:** 1 of 10 (Finding 3.7 — story states)
- **Not Resolved:** 9 of 10

The only improvement observed is that **5 User Stories** have been moved from "New" to "Active" state since the audit: Bomar Service Agreement (#199525), Ryan Service Agreement (#199579), Earl Service Agreement (#199580), Echo Training (#198867), and FTC Jove (#199355). However, none of these 5 have had Description or Acceptance Criteria added — they were moved to Active without meeting Definition of Ready.

All 3 **Critical** findings remain completely unaddressed. The team is now further into the sprint with no burndown visibility (no capacity), no documented requirements (no descriptions/AC), and the same single-point-of-failure risk on Grace.

Would you like me to generate a formal follow-up audit report and save it under `./audit/`?
